whoami.template:
Jui-Hsuan Lee (李睿軒)
學術研究者 | AI工程師 | 資安研究者

研究領域：
  - Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
  - Large Language Models (LLM) Fine-tuning
  - AI在資安領域的應用
  - 生成式AI與領域專家協同流程

論文發表：{publicationsCount} 篇
研討會參與：{conferencesCount} 場
工作經歷：{experiencesCount} 項

commandOutputs.coffee:
☕ Coffee Status: ACTIVE

Research shows that coffee consumption is directly proportional 
to research productivity. Current level: OPTIMAL

Fun fact: Studies suggest that 96.3% of researchers prefer coffee 
while working on LLM fine-tuning datasets. (Source: Personal experience)
commandOutputs.rag:
🔍 Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

RAG is one of my main research focuses!

Key Concepts:
  - Combines retrieval-based and generation-based approaches
  - Enhances LLM responses with external knowledge
  - Reduces hallucination in domain-specific tasks

My Research:
  - RAG-based cybersecurity AI agent
  - Personalized information security assistance
  - Domain-specific knowledge integration
commandOutputs.llm:
🤖 Large Language Models (LLM)

LLM Fine-tuning & Instruction Tuning Specialist

Research Areas:
  - Instruction tuning dataset construction
  - Domain expert collaboration workflows
  - GenAI-assisted data generation
  - Quality improvement through iterative refinement

Key Achievement:
  Data pass rate improved from 49.6% to 96.3% 
  in 3 iteration cycles! 🎉

research.template:
🔬 Research Focus Areas

1. AI in Cybersecurity
   - Personalized security assistance systems
   - RAG-based AI agents
   - Domain-specific LLM applications

2. LLM Fine-tuning
   - High-quality instruction tuning datasets
   - GenAI + Domain Expert collaboration
   - Iterative quality improvement workflows

3. Information Security
   - Security regulation compliance
   - AI-powered security guidance
   - Context-aware recommendations

Publications: {publicationsCount} papers
Conferences: {conferencesCount} participations

commandOutputs.easter-egg:
🥚 Easter Egg Found!

Congratulations! You've discovered a hidden feature.

About Me:
  Name: Jui-Hsuan Lee (李睿軒)
  Role: AI Research Consultant
  Company: 薩摩亞商安盛資訊股份有限公司台灣分公司
  
Research Interests:
  • RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
  • LLM Fine-tuning & Instruction Tuning
  • AI in Cybersecurity Applications
  • GenAI + Domain Expert Collaboration

Fun Facts:
  • Published papers at TANET 2024, TANET 2025, EURO 2025
  • Achieved 96.3% data pass rate in LLM dataset construction
  • Specialized in MCP Server development
  • Expert in Agile PLM, Polarion, Teamcenter AI integration
